title: Verify SSL/TLS certificates
description: Failing to verify SSL/TLS certificates during connections allows man-in-the-middle attacks where attackers can intercept, modify, or eavesdrop on communications. Certificate validation ensures connection authenticity and integrity.
recommendation: Always enable and properly configure SSL/TLS certificate validation for all secure connections.

noncompliant.description: Disabling SSL/TLS certificate validation allows attackers to perform man-in-the-middle attacks using invalid or malicious certificates.

compliant.description: Enabling SSL/TLS certificate validation with proper configuration ensures secure communication and prevents man-in-the-middle attacks.

checks.message: SSL/TLS certificates must be properly verified to ensure secure connections.
